The '''N'ge'u Valley''' was a broad formation within the [[Badlands of N'g'zi/Legends|Badlands of N'g'zi]], located on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. [[Dooku's hangar/Legends|Dooku's hangar]] was located within this valley.<ref name="Episode II" />

{{Loc-stub}}
